content.en:
In order to allow the Flower of Death to recover from his injuries as soon as possible, Ye Tian sent some of his treasures that could heal his injuries to the Chaos Ancient Realm to assist those Flower of Death in healing.

And just like that, the day passed.

"Fairy Xin'er, let's go to the trouble of that silver wolf again!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Good!"

Li Xin'er nodded in response.

Immediately, the two came to Giant Wolf Mountain again.

On the top of the mountain.

When the silver wolf saw Ye Tian and the others coming again, he was angry and a little jealous at the same time.

Yesterday, Ye Tian erased its 100,000-year lifespan, it would naturally feel it, and until now, it was still a little weak.

Now, Ye Tian is here again, if he uses yesterday's means again, it will be troublesome.

But this is its lair, and it can't be let out.

War!

The silver wolf rushed out again and attacked Ye Tian.

The battle began again.

But this time, Ye Tian is the main force, and Li Xin'er is the auxiliary.

After all, Ye Tian is not afraid of injury, no matter how ruthless the silver wolf's attack is, he can transfer the damage to the flower of death, unless the silver wolf's attack completely annihilates those flowers of death, Ye Tian will really be injured.

"Spear of Time!"

"Spear of Time!"

"Spear of Time!"

Ye Tian cast the Spear of Time again and again, and every opportunity was grasped very well, the silver wolf couldn't dodge at all, he was hit again and again, and his life span of 100,000 years was erased again.

At this time, the silver wolf was already showing its old state, and its aura was several times weaker than it was at its peak.

The weakened silver wolf could not even resist the siege of Ye Tian and Li Xin'er, not to mention severely invading Ye Tian.

Time slowly passed, and the silver wolf began to get hurt.

"Spear of the Hell Divine Sky!"

Ye Tian slammed the silver wolf's body with a space supernatural power, and countless spatial forces crushed a large number of the silver wolf's cells, causing the silver wolf to be injured a lot.

It didn't take long for the silver wolf to feel like no match and wanted to flee from here.

But how could Ye Tian allow the silver wolf to leave?

"Ten Thousand Realms!"

"Time freezes!"

Ye Tian used his time and space talents to try his best to prevent the silver wolf from leaving, and Li Xin'er also began to use some one-time attack secret treasures to cause huge trauma to the silver wolf.

Finally, in a mournful roar, the silver wolf completely turned into a corpse.

"Finally killed this silver wolf!"

Li Xin'er breathed a sigh of relief.

Although she has a lot of life-saving treasures, she is also injured at this time.

She glanced at Ye Tian, most of the attacks were borne by Ye Tian, but Ye Tian was like no one.

She couldn't figure out how Ye Tian was immune to the attack of the silver wolf.

This method is too perverted!

Whew!!

Ye Tian and Li Xin'er flew to the top of the giant wolf mountain and soon saw the ancient well.

"This ancient well is a bit like a chaotic ancient well!"

Ye Tian said.

"It's very similar, but it's not a Chaos Ancient Well!"

Li Xin'er preached.

Looking at the silver liquid substance in the ancient well, the two hesitated for a moment, and then each took out a little.

Ye Tian swallowed a little silver liquid substance and tried its effect.

Rumble!!!

Suddenly, Ye Tian's physical body began to absorb the energy contained in the silver liquid substance, and the strength of his physical body, which had originally reached the ultimate level of true god, actually increased a little bit again.

Although this point is very insignificant, Ye Tian has a clear feeling.

On the other hand, Li Xin'er, after trying this silver liquid substance, frowned, and didn't seem to sense anything.

"It didn't work, how could this be?"

Li Xin'er felt very strange.

The silvery liquid substance was like water to her.

At this time, Ye Tian explained: "Fairy Xin'er, this silver liquid substance can increase the strength of your physical body, but your physical strength has been fixed, and you can't continue to improve it, so you can't enjoy the benefits of this silver substance!"

"I see!"

Li Xin'er suddenly realized.

Immediately, she stared at Ye Tian, revealing a curious look.

"Your Highness Wanfa, could it be that you can continue to improve the strength of your physical body?"

Li Xin'er asked.

She had always felt that Ye Tian's physical strength was too terrifying, but it was difficult to ask because of secret questions, but now she couldn't help but ask.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he explained: "In fact, as long as you break the cosmic restrictions at the emperor level and impact the combat power of His Royal Highness at the Supreme level, you will have the qualifications to break the limit of physical strength, but in this way, you will undoubtedly break the rules of the universe, you will be suppressed by the origin of the universe, and even the identity of the son of the universe will be deprived." So, now I'm not a child of the universe!"

"Emperor-level break the combat power of His Royal Highness the Supreme Level!"

Li Xin'er gasped.

All along, she thought that it was impossible for the emperor level to become a supreme-level highness, this was common sense, and the invincible Henggu-level highness was the limit of the emperor-level.

But now, Ye Tian told her that if she broke the limit at the emperor level and became a supreme-level highness, she could continue to improve her physical strength after the god level.

Then, Li Xin'er also knew very well that this step must be very difficult, and it was impossible to do it unless it was a real genius against the sky.

However, what she didn't know was that Ye Tian had not only become a supreme-level highness at the emperor level, but also a son of the era at the god level.

If she knew, she would have been dumbfounded.

"Li Xin'er, according to the agreement, I want half of the silver liquid substance in this ancient well, and you half, how about it?"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Li Xin'er nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out the silver liquid substance in the ancient well.

This ancient well is very large, and there is a lot of silvery liquid substance.

In the end, Ye Tian and Li Xin'er each obtained about ten tons of silver liquid substance.

Next, Ye Tian and Li Xin'er lived together in the chaotic small world for a few more days, and during this time, they also gained some good things, but they were basically some chaos materials.

For example, some Chaos Spirit Flowers, Spirit Plants, etc., are not small in their help to Ye Tian, they can assist in cultivation, and if they are sold, they are also very valuable.

this day.

Ye Tian chose to separate from Li Xin'er, if they continued like this, there would not be many treasures that the two of them could obtain.

If you look for resources separately, you may be able to gain more.

And with Ye Tian and Li Xin'er's life-saving methods, as long as they don't deliberately look for death, the possibility of encountering danger is not too great.

So, the two separated.

The small world of chaos was very large, and Ye Tian chose a direction at random and flew quickly teleporting.

In the blink of an eye, a month has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian felt a faint coercion, although it was weak, but this coercion made Ye Tian feel surrendered.

"The corpse of a powerful chaotic creature is coerced!"

Ye Tian immediately realized.

Moreover, this coercion was even many times stronger than the corpse of the golden and silver wolf.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew in the direction of the corpse's coercion.

If it was a powerful chaotic creature alive, Ye Tian would definitely not dare to approach, but a powerful chaotic creature that died, he would still dare to approach.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to come to a forest.

At this moment, in the middle of the forest, a huge python-like chaotic creature died there, its body lying there as if it were a mountain.

"It's ...... Juggernaut creatures!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

If it was just a dominant-level creature, Ye Tian would not be shocked, the key was that the life level of this dominant-level chaotic creature was far higher than Ye Tian's.

It's definitely not a fourth-order chaotic creature, it's a sixth-order chaotic creature.

"Chaotic creatures in the sixth order will never be found in this universe, even the cosmic gods are only pseudo-fourth-order lifeforms, and the Supreme is estimated to be pseudo-fifth-order lifeforms at most. Where can it be compared to the sixth order of life in front of you. "

Ye Tian thought.

Then, Ye Tian began to get excited.

If you want to cultivate from the fourth layer to the fifth layer, one of the ways to cultivate from the fourth level to the fifth level is to use the life essence of the sixth order of life to assist in cultivation.

Under normal circumstances, it would be impossible for a sixth-order life to take out one's own life essence, and that would shake one's life level.

Therefore, he could only find the dead Sixth Order Life.

But there are not even sixth-order beings in the universe, how to find the corpses of sixth-order lifeforms?

Therefore, before, Ye Tian completely removed this method.

But now, the corpse of a chaotic creature of a sixth-order life appeared in front of him, how could this not shock and excite him.

Of course.

The only question now is how to get close to this Dominant-level Chaos creature?

The opponent's coercion was too strong, and the life level had reached the sixth order, it was very difficult to get close to the corpse of this chaotic creature.

"Let's try it first!"

Ye Tian tried to walk over.

But he hadn't gone far, and the strong pressure made it difficult for Ye Tian to move forward.

In desperation, Ye Tian tried to transfer the damage to the Flower of Death, so that he felt a little better, but when he was very close to the corpse of the chaotic creature, he was about to be unable to bear it.

"Could it be that I really can't get close to the corpse of this Dominant-level Chaos creature?"

Ye Tian asked himself.

At this moment, a black light appeared in the Chaos Ancient Realm, enveloping Ye Tian's whole body.

At this time, the coercion Ye Tian felt disappeared.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This black light turned out to be the light released from the Chaos Black Lotus, he had always thought that the Chaos Black Lotus was a treasure that surpassed the Chaos Spirit Treasure, but he didn't know the use of the Chaos Black Lotus from beginning to end.

Unexpectedly, at this critical moment, the Chaos Black Lotus actually released light to protect him, saving him from the corpse of the dominant-level chaos creature.

"What a really good thing!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, he hurriedly ran to the corpse of the Dominant-level Chaos Creature.

Then, he pulled out a superb artifact knife and began to stab the skin of the Chaos creature.

If this was a living chaotic creature, no matter how Ye Tian attacked, he wouldn't be able to break through its defenses, but now that it was dead, it couldn't use its defensive talent, so its own physical defense wouldn't be too exaggerated.

Under Ye Tian's full strength, he finally pierced the skin of the chaotic creature, and a trace of blood flowed out.

Suddenly, Ye Tian dipped his hands in blood and silently performed the exercises of the fourth layer of the Tianyuan True Method.

Rumble!!!

Countless life essences penetrated into Ye Tian's body from the blood, helping Ye Tian to impact the fifth-order life.
